violations.claim: Help text: "verify [project]   Phase 5 only (no LLM, just Z3)"
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 543
; Help text: "verify [project]   Phase 5 only (no LLM, just Z3)"
; runVerify: if (isHook) { pipeline.runIncremental({ model, ... }) }
; runIncremental is a full LLM-powered derivation pass, not Phase 5 only.
(declare-const hook_flag_present Int)    ; 1 = --hook passed to verify
(declare-const llm_model_used Int)       ; 1 = a model string is passed to the pipeline
(declare-const is_phase5_only Int)       ; 1 = only Z3 verification runs (no LLM)
; Code transition: runVerify calls pipeline.runIncremental({ model, ... }) when --hook
(assert (= hook_flag_present 1))
(assert (=> (= hook_flag_present 1) (= llm_model_used 1)))
; Code transition: runIncremental is NOT the phase-5-only path
(assert (=> (= llm_model_used 1) (= is_phase5_only 0)))
; Violation: "no LLM" claim is false in hook mode
(assert (= hook_flag_present 1))
(assert (= is_phase5_only 0))
(check-sat)
